Link: https://eoldn.org/
Title: Election Official Legal Defense Network
Description: Pairs election officials with pro bono attorneys who can advise them on how to respond to threats and lawsuits, which have increased in recent years. Founded by a former Obama White House lawyer and a former Bush election lawyer.
Action Type: learn
Mode: On Your Own
Cause: Elections

Link: https://electioninnovation.org/donate/
Title: Donate: Election Official Legal Defense Network
Description: Support the Election Official Legal Defense Network, which pairs election officials with pro bono attorneys to defend against increasing threats and lawsuits.
Action Type: donate
Mode: On Your Own
Cause: Elections

Link: https://campaignlegal.org/
Title: Campaign Legal Center
Description: Ensures that election rules remain fair. Fighting the Trump administration's demands for voter data and an executive order that would force states to change voter ID requirements and ballot deadlines. Founded 2002 by a Republican former FEC chair.
Action Type: learn
Mode: On Your Own
Cause: Elections

Link: https://campaignlegal.org/donate
Title: Donate: Campaign Legal Center
Description: Support the Campaign Legal Center's litigation to keep election rules fair heading into the 2026 midterms.
Action Type: donate
Mode: On Your Own
Cause: Elections

Link: https://www.cartercenter.org/programs/democracy/
Title: Carter Center Democracy Program
Description: Founded by Jimmy Carter in 1982. Brings global election monitoring to the US — deploying nonpartisan observers in Georgia, Michigan, Montana, Nevada, and New Mexico in 2026. Also hosts civic education events and offers resources for voters and election officials.
Action Type: learn, donate
Mode: On Your Own
Cause: Elections

Link: https://mobilize.us/nokings

Description: Find and join No Kings rallies and protests near you. National organization mobilizing actions against authoritarian overreach and in defense of democracy and civil rights.
Action Type: protest
Mode: In Person
Time: Sat, Mar 28, 2026 (time varies by location)
Frequency: One-Time
Cause: ICE Abuses, Elections

Description: The New York Times editorial board outlines the threat Trump poses to the 2026 midterm elections and recommends specific actions and organizations to help safeguard democracy.
Action Type: learn
Mode: On Your Own
Cause: ICE Abuses, Elections
